both.summary:
How I Prompt v2 snapshot (Claude Code + Codex)
Date range: Dec 12, 2025 - Feb 12, 2026
Prompts: 5,675 across 1,157 conversations
Persona: The Explorer
Avg prompt length: 83.8 words | Codex share: 13.5%
Top model: gpt-5.2-codex | Iteration style: direct | Complexity: 2.4/5
Source + build: https://github.com/eeshansrivastava89/howiprompt
both.release_notes:
How I Prompt v2 - Release Notes

Scope view: Claude Code + Codex
- Date range covered: Dec 12, 2025 - Feb 12, 2026
- Active data sources: Claude Code + Codex
- Added model attribution from Codex session metadata
- Added trend analytics (daily/weekly rollups, 7d vs 30d deltas, shift markers)
- Added deterministic NLP metrics with confidence (intent, complexity, iteration style)
- Added dashboard launch-kit sharing actions (summary + HN + LinkedIn copy)

Migration note: Claude.ai exports are deprecated and ignored by the v2 pipeline.
GitHub: https://github.com/eeshansrivastava89/howiprompt
Live: https://eeshans.com
both.hn_post:
Show HN: How I Prompt v2 (local analytics for Claude Code + Codex)

I built a local-first dashboard to analyze my prompting patterns (Claude Code + Codex).
It currently covers 5,675 prompts across 1,157 conversations (Dec 12, 2025 - Feb 12, 2026).
v2 adds model attribution, trend analytics, and deterministic NLP metrics.
Migration note: Claude.ai exports are deprecated in v2; active pipeline is Claude Code + Codex.
Repo: https://github.com/eeshansrivastava89/howiprompt
Live demo: https://eeshans.com

Would love feedback on which metrics are most useful for daily AI workflows.
both.linkedin_post:
Shipped How I Prompt v2 for Claude Code + Codex.
Analyzed 5,675 prompts across 1,157 conversations (Dec 12, 2025 - Feb 12, 2026).
Highlights: model attribution, trend analytics, deterministic NLP metrics, and a new launch sharing kit.
Migration note: Claude.ai exports are deprecated in v2; active sources are Claude Code + Codex.
Open source: https://github.com/eeshansrivastava89/howiprompt
Live demo: https://eeshans.com

#buildinpublic #ai #developertools #analytics
